title: Fix dashboard Jest Streamdown ESM resolution
description: Full dashboard CI imports score procedure cards through broad score dashboard tests and fails to resolve ESM-only @streamdown/* packages from Jest. Fix the test configuration so ProcedureTask imports remain usable in full dashboard unit runs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented dashboard Jest repair: mapped Streamdown plugin packages and streamdown/nanoid to stable test mocks, then raised the ProcedureTask optimizer-auth timeout to account for the heavier real component import path in the full dashboard suite. Validation passed locally: full dashboard ci:unit, focused score procedure/evaluation/workbench tests, dashboard typecheck, and optimizer_results pytest.
